description_long: This is a modern, boxy sofa with a bold red exterior and clean, geometric lines. The sofa features two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be firmly attached. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend from the seat to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a solid, enclosed appearance. The upholstery is smooth and appears to be made of synthetic leather or vinyl, with subtle seam lines visible along the edges. The back of the sofa is flat and unadorned, while the base is solid and does not reveal any visible legs. This design is both functional and visually striking, making it suitable for urban public spaces or modern interiors.
description: A modern, boxy red sofa with straight armrests, smooth upholstery, and uniform attached cushions. Its clean lines and solid base give it a bold, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat cushions, two matching backrest cushions, and wide, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned back panel and the sofa's solid, rectangular form.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, emphasizing the armrest and cushion thickness.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all attached and aligned in a simple, symmetrical configuration.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide armrests at seat height, extending to the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, solid profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base appears solid and continuous, suggesting a hidden or recessed support structure.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest composed of two attached, uniform cushions with a flat top and no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red upholstery with a smooth texture and subtle seam lines; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
